networkAccess.reasoning: The workers.dev origin is the pairing bridge: Send to Playground POSTs the read-only component dump there, and Generate/Update receive pushed contract bundles from it by code. api.github.com carries the OPTIONAL Propose-change PR flow (BYO fine-grained token, session-only, never stored; dry-run sends nothing). Dev-only: the local runner fetches generated figma-sync scripts from npm run figma:serve (port 8765), and 8787 is wrangler dev for testing the bridge locally.
